features.name: Tinker's Magic
features.description: Revised version of Magical Tinkering. You can invest magic into objects to create actual practical items or effects. You can create a number of magical objects equal to your Intelligence modifier.

features.name: Spellcasting
features.description: You use Intelligence as your spellcasting ability. Artificers are half-casters who prepare spells from the Artificer spell list. You must use a tool or an infusion as a focus.

features.name: Replicate Magic Item
features.description: Revised version of Infuse Item. You learn 'Plans' that allow you to create specific magic items. The flexibility is increased, allowing for broader categories of items at higher levels.

features.name: Artificer Subclass
features.description: You choose your specialist archetype: Alchemist, Armorer, Artillerist, Battle Smith, or Cartographer. You gain subclass features at levels 3, 6, 10, and 14.

features.name: Ability Score Improvement
features.description: Standard 2024 ASI rules apply. You gain a feat of your choice, typically increasing an ability score.

features.name: Extra Attack
features.description: If you are a Battle Smith or Armorer, you typically gain this or a similar combat-enhancing feature. Otherwise, you gain a specialist feature.

features.name: Magic Item Tinker
features.description: You gain expertise with all tools you are proficient with, and your ability to craft and manipulate magic items improves.

features.name: Subclass Feature
features.description: You gain a feature from your chosen specialist archetype.

features.name: Flash of Genius (Revised)
features.description: You can add your Intelligence modifier to an ability check or saving throw for yourself or a creature within 30 feet. In the 2024 version, you regain all expended uses when you finish a Short or Long Rest.

features.name: Magic Item Adept
features.description: You can attune to up to four magic items at once, and crafting common/uncommon items is faster and cheaper.

features.name: Subclass Feature
features.description: You gain a feature from your chosen specialist archetype.

features.name: Spell-Storing Item (Buffed)
features.description: You can store a spell of up to 3rd level from the Artificer spell list in an object. A creature holding the object can use an action to cast the spell using your spellcasting ability modifier.

features.name: Magic Item Savant
features.description: You can attune to up to five magic items at once and ignore all requirements for attunement.

features.name: Subclass Feature
features.description: You gain a feature from your chosen specialist archetype.

features.name: Magic Item Master
features.description: You can attune to up to six magic items at once.

features.name: Epic Boon
features.description: You gain an Epic Boon of your choice, a powerful feat available only at level 20.

features.name: Soul of Artifice
features.description: You gain a +1 bonus to all saving throws per magic item you are currently attuned to.
